name: the-44-percent-rule
description: The 44% Rule — Find 44% more AI use cases in your business. A Claude Code plugin based on Kim, Kim & Koning (2026) field experiment of 515 startups: businesses shown how others reorganize around AI find 44% more use cases, 1.9x higher revenue, and 18% more likely to acquire paying customers. Automates the 'showing' so any business can apply the finding in under 10 minutes.
